business.name: Cuts R Us Lawn & Landscape, LLC.

hero.headline: Auburn lawns that look *this good* don't happen by accident
hero.subheadline: Professional crew, fair pricing, and we actually show up when scheduled.

services_section.label: THE WORK
services_section.heading: Lawn Care That Actually Gets Done
services_section.subheading: From weekly cuts to complete landscape overhauls

services.title: Lawn Mowing & Maintenance
services.description: Weekly or bi-weekly cuts, edging, and cleanup. Your grass stays healthy and your neighbors stay impressed.

services.title: Landscape Installation
services.description: New flower beds, shrub planting, and hardscape features. We design it, we install it, we guarantee it.

services.title: Yard Cleanup & Restoration
services.description: Overgrown properties, storm damage, or just years of neglect. We'll bring your yard back to life.

services.title: Seasonal Services
services.description: Leaf removal, mulching, pruning, and winterization. Year-round care that keeps your property looking sharp.

about.heading: Built for Auburn Yards
about.body: We're the Auburn landscaping crew that treats your property like our own. Professional work, honest pricing, and we answer our phone.

reviews_section.label: WORD OF MOUTH
reviews_section.heading: What Auburn Says About Our Work

reviews.name: Linda F.
reviews.text: Used this service for over 7 years. They exceed my expectations every time. Kyle is professional, committed, and trustworthy.

reviews.name: James K.
reviews.text: Reliable and hardworking crew. Kyle and his team transformed my inherited 60-year-old property that sat empty for a decade.

reviews.name: John W.
reviews.text: Professional team that arrived on time, gave reasonable quote, and delivered great work. Definitely recommend.

cta.heading: Ready for a yard you'll actually be proud of?
cta.body: Free estimates, honest pricing, and work that speaks for itself. See why Auburn trusts us with their lawns.
